who: procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses using Shopify, processing 10-20 purchase orders/week
offer: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses using Shopify processing 10-20 purchase orders/week, manual tracking causes late orders and supplier penalties. We provide compliance summaries instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Lack of visibility into purchase order approvals and compliance tracking.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on procurement tools
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo links
Share insights in community forums for procurement managers
try_it: Let users try manual entry of purchase orders and compliance summaries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
